expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度] 为总尺寸，[板材厚度] 为顶部、底部和侧板材料的厚度，[背板厚度] 为背板材料的厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดรวม, [BoardThick] คือความหนาวัสดุแผ่นไม้ด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาวัสดุแผ่นหลัง. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu ván trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu ván sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa isang kabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuan ng Sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal para sa Itaas, Ibaba, at Gilid na Board, ang [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal para sa Background Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ပုံမှန်မီတာများကိုဘော့်အသီးအိတ်အစားထိုးနည်းကိုမီတာများနှင့်အနည်းကျပေးထားသောစာရင်းအတိုင်းတွက်ချက်ပြီး၊အထပ်သားများအထက်၊အောက်နှင့်အနားဘျားတို့တွင်အသုံးပြုသောအထပ်သားအထူများ၊နောက်ခံအညာအထူသည် နောက်ခံ နောက်ကျူးအပ်နိုင်ပါသည်။(AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាអង្កត់ផ្ចិតបន្ទះសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជា វិមាត្រសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈផ្ទាំងផ្ទះល្វែងលើ, ក្រោម និងចំហៀង, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈផ្ទាំងផ្ទះល្វែងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄຳນວນຂະໜາດແຜ່ນໄມ້ສໍາລັບຕູ້.​ [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂະໜາດລວມ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງສະຫນອງແຜ່ນໄມ້ເບື້ອງເທນ, ທາງລຸ້ນແລະສະຫນອງໄມ້ເບື້ອງຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງໄມ້ເບື້ອງຫລັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットのボードサイズを計算します。[Width], [Height], [Depth] は全体の寸法です。[BoardThick] はトップ、ボトム、サイドボードの素材の厚さで、[BackBoardThick] はバックボードの素材の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 치수이며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드 재료의 두께이고 [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 재료의 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de los tableros para un armario. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de los tableros superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero trasero. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des panneaux pour un cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les mesures totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur des matériaux des panneaux supérieurs, inférieurs et latéraux, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur des matériaux du panneau arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnung der Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtabmessungen, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड का आकार गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, निचले और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Рассчитывает размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — это толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковой доски, [BackBoardThick] — это толщина материала задней панели. (AI translated, please check)
